session.user:
Run pytest on tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py and report results. Also run ty and ruff check on the new files: - src/erk/core/stack_sync.py - src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py - tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Report all output.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the test file and then run ty and ruff checks on the specified files.

session.assistant:
## Test Results Summary
### pytest: 4 passed, 7 failed
**Failures:** Tests are checking for specific strings in the command output that don't match actual behavior. The tests expect messages like "already in sync", "fast-forwarded", "rebased", and "CONFLICT" but the actual output shows "skipped (no remote)" for all branches.
Key issues: - `test_sync_all_branches_in_sync` - Expects "already in sync" but got "skipped (no remote)" - `test_sync_branch_behind_fast_forward_not_checked_out` - Expects "fast-forwarded" but got "skipped (no remote)" - `test_sync_branch_behind_fast_forward_current` - Expects "fast-forwarded" but got "skipped (no remote)" - `test_sync_branch_diverged_rebase` - Expects "rebased" but got "skipped (no remote)" - `test_sync_branch_checked_out_elsewhere_skipped` - Expects "1 skipped" but got "2 skipped" - `test_sync_conflict_aborts_rebase` - Expects "CONFLICT" but got "skipped (no remote)" - `test_sync_branch_ahead_only_no_action` - Expects "already in sync" but got "skipped (no remote)"
### ty (Type Checker): Found 2 diagnostics
**File: tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py** - Line 39: `invalid-argument-type` - `build_context()` expects `FakeGraphite | None` but got `GraphiteDisabled` - Line 372: `unresolved-attribute` - `GitRemoteOps` has no attribute `fetch_prune_calls`
### ruff (Linter): Found 11 errors
**File: src/erk/core/stack_sync.py** - Line 91: `F841` - Unused variable `trunk` - Line 96: `E501` - Line too long (110 > 100) - Line 143: `E501` - Line too long (109 > 100) - Line 150: `E501` - Line too long (104 > 100) - Line 154: `E501` - Line too long (122 > 100) - Line 170: `E501` - Line too long (134 > 100) - Line 173: `E501` - Line too long (121 > 100) - Line 190: `E501` - Line too long (109 > 100) - Line 195: `E501` - Line too long (120 > 100) - Line 198: `E501` - Line too long (109 > 100)
**File: tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py** - Line 216: `F841` - Unused variable `wt_path`
